desires: Confront my roommate directly about the odor now, even though I am exhausted, because avoiding it would permanently fracture our bond.
Maintain my integrity as a reliable teammate by not letting my fatigue excuse me from this necessary conflict.
Secure the long-term stability of our living arrangement before the stress of unresolved tension compounds tomorrow.

goals.description: Execute the direct, non-hostile confrontation with roommate_R about the hygiene/odor immediately to establish a boundary before my exhaustion peaks.
goals.rationale: My Affiliation value (0.5) demands I protect the trust in my relationship with teammate_A rather than letting resentment fester silently. My Assertiveness (8) requires me to set this boundary now; delaying risks snapping at someone I care about when my stress hits its peak. Addressing this directly prevents future conflict that would cost us both more energy later, aligning with my long-term planning horizon.

goals.description: Secure a concrete agreement on cleaning standards today so I don't have to endure this sleep deprivation and stress for another week.
goals.rationale: I am operating with low risk tolerance (3) and a deliberate mindset; vague promises are a liability. By negotiating specific terms now, I ensure the outcome serves our shared living environment without requiring me to expend excessive emotional capital later. This protects my health (0.13) and preserves the integrity of our friendship.

goals.description: Complete the reading response draft quickly to clear mental bandwidth, ensuring I can participate fully in the upcoming meal with cohort_3 without projecting unresolved tension.
goals.rationale: While academic output matters (0.15), it is secondary to maintaining group cohesion (0.5). However, bringing unfinished work to the table risks appearing unreliable to my close friends. Given my Deliberate nature, I will defer the deep dive until after the confrontation, using the remaining focus capacity only enough to finish the draft so I can show up present for the meal.
